:::{#def-breslow-baseline-cuhaz-est}
#### Breslow estimator of the baseline cumulative hazard

$$\hat \cuhaz_0(t) \eqdef
\sum_{t_i \le t} \frac{d_i}{\sum_{k\in R(t_i)} \hazfactor(\vx_k)}$$

where, for the distinct event times $t_1 < \cdots < t_K$ of the data set:

- $d_i$ is the number of events at $t_i$;
- $R(t_i) = \set{j : Y_j \ge t_i}$ is the risk set at $t_i$ (where $Y_j = \min(T_j, C_j)$ is subject $j$'s observed follow-up time) — the subjects still under observation just before $t_i$;
- $\hazfactor(\vx) = \expf{\tp{\vx}\vb}$ is the hazard ratio (risk score) for covariate pattern $\vx$.

:::
